kw.name: Run Keywords
Create API Session
Log
kw.msg: Creating API session for https://bms.startnow-fr.com/backend/api with alias 'api_session'
kw.arg: Creating API session for ${base_url} with alias '${alias}'
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api_session, url=https://bms.startnow-fr.com/backend/api, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=30, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Creates a reusable HTTP session for the given base URL. This session is used by all request keywords in ApiClient.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST Request
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://bms.startnow-fr.com/backend/api/auth/login path_url=/backend/api/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '63', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"email": "superAdmin@start-now.fr", "password": "BMSstart10*"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Sends an HTTP POST request with a JSON body to the given endpoint.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Bearer Token
Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Configures Bearer token authentication. Stores the Authorization header for use in subsequent requests.
Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://bms.startnow-fr.com/backend/api/auth/login path_url=/backend/api/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Cookie': 'refreshToken=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJodHRwOi8vYm1zLnN0YXJ0bm93LWZyLmNvbS9hcGkvYXV0aC9sb2dpbiIsImlhdCI6MTc4MzgwOTQzMSwiZXhwIjoxNzg1MDE5MDMxLCJuYmYiOjE3ODM4MDk0MzEsImp0aSI6ImZsV1BRUlVHOWY5U3BsSTMiLCJzdWIiOiIxIiwicHJ2IjoiMjNiZDVjODk0OWY2MDBhZGIzOWU3MDFjNDAwODcyZGI3YTU5NzZmNyIsInRva2VuX3R5cGUiOiJyZWZyZXNoIn0.HFnupz_Q-WS91R5udXxTGXinq3yrE6MrXT2y2d5zu44', 'Content-Length': '63', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"email": "superAdmin@start-now.fr", "password": "BMSstart10*"}'

kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Sends an HTTP POST request with a JSON body to the given endpoint.

kw.name: Validate Status Code
Set Variable If
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Should Not Be Equal
kw.arg: No response available. Pass a response or call a request keyword first.
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are equal.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Validates that the response status code matches the expected value.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Validate Status Code In List
Set Variable If
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Should Not Be Equal
kw.arg: No response available. Pass a response or call a request keyword first.
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are equal.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: Status code ${target.status_code} not in expected list: ${expected_statuses}
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Status code 200 is in expected list
kw.arg: Status code ${target.status_code} is in expected list
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Validates that the response status code is one of the expected values.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

test.doc: Verifies that status code is in expected list.

kw.name: Get Auth Headers
Should Not Be Equal
kw.arg: No authentication configured. Call Set Bearer Token, Set Basic Auth, or Set API Key Auth first.
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are equal.
Returns the currently configured authentication headers. Use this to merge auth headers into request headers.

kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://bms.startnow-fr.com/backend/api/dashboard/charts?building_id=1 path_url=/backend/api/dashboard/charts?building_id=1 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJodHRwOi8vYm1zLnN0YXJ0bm93LWZyLmNvbS9hcGkvYXV0aC9sb2dpbiIsImlhdCI6MTc4MzgwOTQzMSwiZXhwIjoxNzgzODEwMDMxLCJuYmYiOjE3ODM4MDk0MzEsImp0aSI6IlUxd055SGVYN1puODAxRFMiLCJzdWIiOiIxIiwicHJ2IjoiMjNiZDVjODk0OWY2MDBhZGIzOWU3MDFjNDAwODcyZGI3YTU5NzZmNyJ9.Jgwtz3vTAlcZeoo51i2Q0Q90DUshZKWq8Q8etfb6VBo', 'Cookie': 'refreshToken=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJodHRwOi8vYm1zLnN0YXJ0bm93LWZyLmNvbS9hcGkvYXV0aC9sb2dpbiIsImlhdCI6MTc4MzgwOTQzNCwiZXhwIjoxNzg1MDE5MDM0LCJuYmYiOjE3ODM4MDk0MzQsImp0aSI6Im9hYVdqQmFub1JyU0FkMVkiLCJzdWIiOiIxIiwicHJ2IjoiMjNiZDVjODk0OWY2MDBhZGIzOWU3MDFjNDAwODcyZGI3YTU5NzZmNyIsInRva2VuX3R5cGUiOiJyZWZyZXNoIn0.y90RI1Fd8THL-cxAaQ9JC5OPRM4pt3CpgrTNgnWu7s4'} body=None

Sends an HTTP GET request to the given endpoint.

kw.name: Validate Status Code
Set Variable If
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Should Not Be Equal
kw.arg: No response available. Pass a response or call a request keyword first.
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are equal.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Validates that the response status code matches the expected value.

kw.name: Validate Response Is JSON
Set Variable If
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Should Not Be Equal
kw.arg: No response available. Pass a response or call a request keyword first.
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are equal.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.arg: Response body is not valid JSON: ${target.text}
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Validates that the response body is valid JSON.

kw.name: Validate Response Body Is Not Empty
Set Variable If
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Should Not Be Equal
kw.arg: No response available. Pass a response or call a request keyword first.
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are equal.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Validates that the response body is not empty.

test.doc: Verifies dashboard endpoint returns valid response.

kw.name: Delete API Session
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Delete All Sessions
kw.doc: Removes all the session objects
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Deletes the active HTTP session and cleans up state. Should be called in test teardown to ensure proper cleanup.
